macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Closes Down 0.37% at 6,556.37 Amid Middle East Tensions
items.summary: The S&P 500 declined 0.37% to finish at 6,556.37 on March 24, 2026, following a recovery on Monday. Stocks faced renewed pressure from escalating conflict in the Middle East.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Struggles as Safe Haven Amid Iran Conflict Extension
items.summary: Bitcoin has dropped about 5% over the last eight days, trading near $70,000, failing its safe haven test as the Iran war enters its fourth week. Correlations with S&P 500 have risen to 2.6, marking it more as a risk-on asset.[4]

items.title: Morgan Stanley Files for Bitcoin ETF Under Ticker MSBT
items.summary: Morgan Stanley has filed for a Bitcoin ETF, potentially becoming the first major bank to launch one if approved. This move signals growing institutional interest amid market volatility.[4]

items.title: Quantum Computing Poses Existential Threat to Bitcoin Cryptography
items.summary: A report from Ark Invest and Unchained discusses 'Q Day' when quantum computers could crack Bitcoin's encryption, though post-quantum solutions are in development by Coinbase, Ethereum Foundation, and others. Scenarios range from decades away to nearer-term risks.[2]

items.title: MicroStrategy Plans Massive $42 Billion Bitcoin Purchase
items.summary: MicroStrategy is reportedly planning to buy $42 billion worth of Bitcoin, likely by issuing more shares to raise funds. This follows previous acquisitions and aims to bolster its BTC holdings.[3]

items.title: Ethereum Sees Whale Accumulation Amid Buy Zone
items.summary: Whales withdrew 54,000 ETH from Binance in the last two hours, with Ethereum hitting a historical buy zone as MVRV ratio drops. Bitcoin remains neutral around $72,600 resistance.[3]

items.title: Markets Volatile Due to US Ultimatum on Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Bitcoin and altcoins plunged following a US ultimatum demanding Iran free the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours, amid threats to oil facilities; a short-term postponement led to some recovery. Fear & Greed Index signals buy opportunities.[5]

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Vertafore Wins AI Excellence Award for Insurance Innovation
items.summary: Vertafore received the 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Award from the Business Intelligence Group for its AI-powered tools that enhance insurance workflows, predict client churn, and automate data processes. The recognition highlights measurable outcomes in productivity and growth for agencies and carriers.

items.title: DigitalOcean Powers Workato's AI Agents with NVIDIA GPUs
items.summary: DigitalOcean announced that Workato’s AI Research Lab adopted its inference-optimized platform, achieving 67% lower costs, 67% higher throughput, and 77% faster response times for Llama-3.3-70B models. This supports development of next-generation enterprise AI agents.

items.title: CoreWeave Expands AI Cloud with NVIDIA HGX B300 at GTC
items.summary: CoreWeave announced an expansion of its AI cloud platform at NVIDIA’s GTC conference, introducing NVIDIA HGX B300 for enhanced AI workload performance and new Weights & Biases tools for reinforcement learning and agent development.

items.title: ACEDS Midwest Launches AI Series for Legal Practice Starting March 25
items.summary: The ACEDS Midwest chapters announced a six-webinar series on Artificial Intelligence in Legal Practice, beginning March 25 with 'AI 101: Evolution, Capabilities, and the Road Ahead,' focusing on real-world AI tools and workflows in eDiscovery.

items.title: van der Schaar Lab Releases White Paper on Creativity in Machine Learning
items.summary: Prof. Mihaela van der Schaar's lab at Cambridge published a white paper arguing that true creativity in AI systems represents the next frontier, beyond scaling larger models.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Pokémon Champions Release Date Announced
items.summary: Pokémon Champions is set to release on Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 on April 8, 2026. The announcement was made on March 24, 2026, highlighting upcoming video game content from The Pokémon Company.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: SpaceX Plans Largest IPO in US History
items.summary: SpaceX is preparing to file for an IPO as early as this week, aiming to raise over $75 billion, which would potentially make it the largest IPO in US history.

items.title: Binance Futures Launches Stock Perpetual Contracts
items.summary: Binance Futures will launch perpetual contracts for Meta, NVIDIA, and Alphabet stocks on March 26, 2026, with maximum leverage of 10x for each.

items.title: Coinbase Launches Impossible Cloud Network Trading Pair
items.summary: Coinbase has launched spot trading for the Impossible Cloud Network (ICNT-USD) trading pair.

items.title: Philippines Declares National Energy Emergency
items.summary: The Philippines has declared a national energy emergency, signaling significant concerns about the country's power supply.
